sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content:
Pale Ale Drink in moderation. Information Source Artisan Goods Ginger Island Resort Buff(s) Tipsy Speed (−1) Buff Duration 30s Energy / Health 50 22 70 31 90 40 130 58 Sell Prices Base Artisan (+40%) 300g 375g 450g 600g 420g 525g 630g 840g Artisan Goods Equipment Keg Processing Time 2250m (37.5h) Ingredients Hops (1)
Pale Ale is an Artisan Good made from the Keg using Hops , taking 1-2 days. It is also available at the Ginger Island Resort for data-sort-value="1000"> 1,000g . Pam sells Pale Ale in her shop at the Desert Festival for data-sort-value="30"> 30 Calico Eggs . When consumed, Pale Ale causes a Tipsy buff that decreases Speed by 1.

sections.heading: Aged Values
sections.content:
Pale Ale can be placed inside a Cask to age from normal quality to silver, gold, and eventually iridium quality. Iridium quality doubles the base sell price of Pale Ale.
Normal, silver, and gold quality Pale Ale can be prematurely removed from a cask at any time by striking the cask with an Axe , Hoe , or Pickaxe .

sections.heading: Bundles
sections.content: Pale Ale is one of the options for the Brewer's Bundle in the Pantry (Remixed) .

sections.heading: Tailoring
sections.content: Pale Ale can be used in the spool of the Sewing Machine to create the Black Leather Jacket . It can be used in dyeing , serving as a yellow dye at the dye pots, located in Emily 's and Haley 's house, 2 Willow Lane .

sections.heading: Quests
sections.content: - Pam requests a Pale Ale by mail on the 14th of Summer in the "Pam Is Thirsty" quest . The reward is data-sort-value="350"> 350g and 1 Friendship heart.

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.0 : Introduced.
- 1.1 : Added ability to age inside casks .
- 1.4 : Can now be used in Tailoring .
- 1.5 : Is now an option in the Brewer's Bundle.
- 1.6 : Can now be purchased at Desert Festival .
